task:
Open /home/user/Documents/arrow.png in GIMP — a 400x200 image with a red left half and a green right half.

Flip the image horizontally so the green half is now on the left and the red half is on the right, then export the result as PNG to /home/user/Documents/arrow_flipped.png. The output must remain 400x200 pixels.

verification.description: Left side pixel is green after horizontal flip (was red before)
Right side pixel is red after horizontal flip (was green before)
